questions.question: How often did the high priest enter the Most Holy Place under the old covenant?
questions.feedback: Only the high priest entered the inner room, and only once a year.

questions.question: Christ entered heaven to appear before God on whose behalf?
questions.feedback: Christ entered heaven itself to appear in God's presence on our behalf.

questions.question: Christ had to offer himself many times as a sacrifice.
questions.feedback: Christ did not need to offer himself repeatedly — he appeared once for all to do away with sin.

questions.question: Without the shedding of _____ there is no forgiveness.
questions.feedback: Without the shedding of blood there is no forgiveness of sins.

questions.question: People are destined to die once, and after that to face _____.
questions.feedback: People are destined to die once and after that to face judgment.
